name: XXXTentacion

acts.description: Documented domestic violence against pregnant girlfriend Geneva Ayala, including false imprisonment and assault
Witness intimidation and threatening behavior toward accusers

behavior_summary: Facing 15 charges of robbery, assault, and domestic violence at the time of his murder in 2018. Documented abuse of pregnant girlfriend including false imprisonment. His death transformed him into a martyr, largely erasing the record.

art.summary: Polarizing SoundCloud rapper who influenced a generation of lo-fi emotionally raw hip-hop. Died at 20, already facing serious charges.

verdict.blurb: Died before he could be held accountable, and the internet promptly canonized him. His victim is still alive and has to watch the tributes roll in every year.
